overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a futuristic urban environment. The character ascends stairs, traverses an overgrown encampment area, and walks through city streets with towering skyscrapers under bright midday sun.

events.description: begin ascending the concrete staircase from the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide concrete staircase flanked by modern buildings and palm trees

wide concrete staircase leading upward between buildings
tall palm trees lining the staircase
low industrial building with green graffiti on metal facade
large open concrete paved area at the base of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a sunlit concrete plaza surrounded by modern architecture. The camera ascends a wide central staircase, passing palm trees, with a dark glass office building on the left and an industrial structure on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban encampment with makeshift shelters

events.description: transition from concrete plaza to overgrown dirt path between buildings
passing by accumulated trash bags and makeshift camping tents

agents.ego_description: walking through a neglected overgrown path with dry grass and scattered debris

entered.detail: elevated concrete walkway or bridge structure overhead
tall dry yellow grass and weeds covering the ground
piles of blue and black garbage bags accumulated on the side
black metal chain link fence with barbed wire topping
makeshift camping tents and temporary shelters
tall red and white construction crane visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow overgrown path between buildings, with dry grass and dirt underfoot. The camera passes makeshift encampments with tents and trash bags piled along a chain-link fence, while construction cranes rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with food vendor

events.description: exiting overgrown area into open paved plaza with city skyline view
turning right onto sidewalk with green railings

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza past a food vendor cart and following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: food vendor cart with large yellow umbrella and blue containers
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise towers
open plaza area with distinctive teal colored pavement tiles

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overgrown path, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza with teal pavement and a panoramic view of the futuristic city skyline. The camera passes a food vendor cart with a yellow umbrella and follows a pedestrian in a brown coat before turning toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with green railings leading to major intersection

events.description: crossing the street at a marked pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk with green railings and crossing the intersection toward the yellow building

entered.detail: green metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
distinctive modern building with yellow and orange facade panels and glass windows
marked pedestrian crossing with white stripes across the street
traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a sidewalk lined with green metal railings alongside a city street. The camera approaches a major intersection, passing modern glass towers, and crosses the street at a crosswalk toward a distinctive yellow and orange building that dominates the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile corporate plaza through a derelict urban alleyway and finally into a bustling futuristic city center. It begins by ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by palm trees and glass office buildings under a bright midday sun. As the camera moves forward, the polished architecture gives way to a narrow, overgrown path where dry grass and makeshift encampments line a chain-link fence beneath distant construction cranes. The scene then opens into a sunlit plaza with teal pavement and a panoramic skyline view, passing a yellow food vendor umbrella before turning toward the main thoroughfare. Finally, the camera follows a sidewalk with green metal railings toward a major intersection, crossing the street to face a towering, distinctive yellow and orange building.
